title: Add small-set RCA path for fewer than 5 incorrect items
description:
## Summary
Add a small-set RCA path for feedback-backed evaluations with fewer than five incorrect items.

## Deliverables
- Replace the current "no topics / insufficient data" outcome with direct LLM summarization over the small incorrect set.
- Reuse the standard RCA analysis methods rather than inventing a separate ad hoc path.
- Persist usable RCA output even when the incorrect set is small.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation: add small-set RCA summarization path for <5 incorrect items in FeedbackEvaluation._run_root_cause_analysis, returning usable root_cause payload instead of empty/no-topics.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented small-set RCA path: when incorrect candidate count is 1-4, FeedbackEvaluation now runs direct RCA summarization and persists a usable root_cause payload (single topic summary) instead of returning no-topics/insufficient-data. Added targeted tests in Evaluation_feedback_test.
